are_you_ok.title: Uvalde man escapes floodwaters after car becomes stranded in Leona River
are_you_ok.summary: Anchor of the major Hill Country flooding event — 15-25 inches of rain, near a year's worth. A diffuse regional flood event in the metro's region; broad daily-life effect warrants a check-in. Uvalde escape detail is the local hook for this event cluster.
are_you_ok.description: Some communities saw 15 to 25 inches of rain over just a few days, with some areas receiving nearly a year's worth of rainfall.

conversation_starters.title: KPOPWORLD Festival bringing Jay Park, The Rose and more to Alamodome
conversation_starters.summary: Marquee new festival coming to Alamodome. You could open with: 'Did you hear a big K-pop festival is coming to the Alamodome this fall?'
conversation_starters.description: The first KPOPWORLD Festival in Texas is coming to San Antonio this fall with global artists, a dance championship and an international vendor village.

conversation_starters.title: USAA gives $5M to Alamo Plan to highlight San Antonio military community
conversation_starters.summary: USAA gives $5M to Alamo Plan for veteran space/mural — major employer + marquee downtown project. You could open with: 'Did you see USAA put $5M into the Alamo Plan for a veterans' space?'
conversation_starters.description:
USAA's contribution creates a resting area for veterans at the site, plus a mural to highlight San Antonio’s identity as Military City USA.
USAA gives $5M to Alamo Plan to highlight San Antonio military community was first posted on July 21, 2026 at 2:37 pm.
